item.description: TWO-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT.
L.Lehnen rushed up the middle to DAL 2 for yards.
Tackled by R.Correia; T.Carter at DAL 2.
TWO-POINT ATTEMPT FAILS.
The Replay Official reviewed the runner was down by contact and the play was upheld.

TWO-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT. L.Lehnen rushed up the middle to DAL 2 for yards. Tackled by R.Correia; T.Carter at DAL 2. TWO-POINT ATTEMPT FAILS. The Replay Official reviewed the runner was down by contact and the play was upheld.
